options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: game_goal
options.description: Determines what opens up Death Egg in Emerls Holy Summit.

options.name: start_story
options.description: Choose which character's story you want to start with.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: max_lives
options.description: Sets the maximum number of KO's or lives characters need/have in battle

options.name: starting_skill_points
options.description: Starting Skill Points (Vanilla is 30)

options.name: max_skill_points
options.description: Sets the maximum skill points you can hold, will be rounded down sometimes. (Vanilla is 500)

options.name: skill_point_multiplier
options.description:
Multiplier for natural skill point gain after battles.

There will always be enough items in the multiworld to reach the SP maximum. 
You can enable this option if you still want to be able to grind for SP.

options.name: start_skills
options.description:
Start the game with specific skill cards 
example: ['Sonic Run','Tails Hop']

options.name: include_skills
options.description:
Guarantee that listed skills get added into the skill card pool
example: ['Sonic Run','Tails Hop']

options.name: include_ultimate_skills
options.description: Always include the full set of Ultimate Emerl Cards

options.name: include_skill_support
options.description: If enabled will add one random card of each type of support skill

options.name: include_skill_combo
options.description: If enabled will add one random combo skill card

options.name: include_skill_awaken
options.description: If enabled will add one random awakened skill card

options.name: music_random
options.description: Shuffles game music

options.name: sound_random
options.description: Shuffles game sound effects

options.name: voice_random
options.description: Shuffles game voices

options.name: jingle_random
options.description: Shuffles game jingles

options.name: text_random
options.description: Randomizes story text

options.name: color_random
options.description: Randomizes some hit effects, shield and healing palettes

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
